design_elements: contrast between satin body and matte knit hood
consensus.fabric: satin shell with ribbed knit trim and cotton/fleece jersey hood
consensus.overall_description: A black satin hooded bomber jacket featuring a snap-button front closure, an attached drawstring hood in jersey knit fabric, and an embroidered rose-and-clouds motif on the left chest. The jacket has ribbed knit cuffs and waistband with a relaxed streetwear silhouette.
patches: small branded label/tag visible at inner neckline area with colorful design
consensus.stitching_details: standard seam construction, ribbed knit banding at cuffs and hem
